about.title: About ChattingApp
about.description: ChattingApp is a modern real-time messaging platform built with Next.js 16 to practice full-stack web development using modern tools and scalable architecture.
about.what_is_chattingapp_description: ChattingApp is a real-time chat application where users can create accounts, authenticate securely, and communicate instantly with others in a modern and responsive interface.
about.what_features_does_the_app_support: What features does the app support?
about.what_features_does_the_app_support_descr: ChattingApp currently supports authentication, real-time messaging, dark and light mode, responsive design, and multilingual support including English and Arabic.
about.which_technologies_are_used_description: The project is built using Next.js 16, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui with a focus on clean architecture and modern UI development practices.
about.why_was_this_project_created_description: This application was created as a learning project to improve frontend and backend development skills while building a realistic production-style application from scratch using AI in only 1% of the project.
about.what_are_the_future_plans_description: Future improvements may include group chats, file uploads, emoji reactions, voice messages, and enhanced user profiles.
